summary: Iteration 11 frontend polish verified: video deep-link ?v=idx auto-opens player, keyboard shortcuts (←/→/Esc) work with wraparound, URL syncs on nav, ?v= is stripped on close. Hint '← → esc' visible in header. Regressions clean.
passed: GET /place/{Bar Basso id}?v=1 auto-opens video-player-modal on load
Modal header shows '2 / 3' for v=1 (correct 1-based index for 2nd video)
Header hint '← → esc' rendered (uppercase via CSS)
ArrowRight advances index and updates URL to ?v=2 (3/3)
ArrowRight from last video wraps to ?v=0
ArrowLeft from first video wraps to ?v=2
ArrowLeft steps back and updates URL (v=2 -> v=1)
Escape closes modal and removes ?v= from URL
Clicking video-source-0 rail item sets URL to ?v=0 (deep-linkable)
video-player-prev button still works with wraparound
video-player-next button still works with wraparound
